name: pluto
description: Discover candidates and check monthly credit balances through Pluto.

interface.longDescription: Run metered searches across Pluto's authorized candidate network and check your exact monthly credit balance through its MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Find senior account executives in New York with SaaS experience.
Find former SDRs who became account executives.
Find sales leaders with MEDDICC experience.
How many Pluto credits do I have left, and when do they reset?
